Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "fix text crispness: declare PerMonitorV2 dpiAwareness in app.manifest \(was missing; WPF was rendering bitmap-scaled on HiDPI -> jagged/uneven CJK strokes\)")
Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "build: suppress WinForms WFO0003 \(manifest DPI is the correct mechanism for this WPF app\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "fix HiDPI text jaggies from shadows: WPF Effect rasterizes enclosed text to an offscreen bitmap scaled at HiDPI -> uneven/broken strokes. Move text out of effect layers — 2-layer cards \(CardHost\), tray menu, toast \(empty shadow caster behind + content in front\); drop subtle title-bar/sidebar/clipboard-tab shadows \(tone separation\); remove combobox dropdown shadow")

Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "settings ui: merge title bar into content \(gray, no top divider; keep sidebar/content left-right separation\); selected nav item = filled pill + right rail, no border; weaken all elevation/popup shadows")

Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "settings ui: full-height left rail \(left-right two-column structure\), restore subtle sidebar-content divider, no top divider; weaken remaining capture/annotation toolbar shadows; selected nav already = blue pill + right rail")

Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "settings ui: remove sidebar-content divider; widen left rail 168->200; bigger selected nav item \(font 14, taller padding, more spacing\); enlarge window title 13->15 — better left/right balance")

PowerShell($zip = Join-Path $env:TEMP "misans\\MiSans.zip"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $zip\)\) { $zip = Join-Path $env:TEMP "MiSans.zip" }; "ZIP=$zip exists=$\(Test-Path $zip\)"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $a=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $a.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'SC' -and $_.FullName -match '\\.\(ttf|otf\)$' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; $a.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($zip = "C:\\Users\\kabuda\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\MiSans.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $a=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $a.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\\.\(ttf|otf\)$' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object; "----TOTAL----"; \($a.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\\.\(ttf|otf\)$' }\).Count; $a.Dispose\(\))

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore; foreach\($f in @\('\\''MiSans-Regular.ttf'\\'','\\''MiSans-Medium.ttf'\\'','\\''MiSans-Semibold.ttf'\\''\)\){ $uri=[Uri]\('\\''file:///E:/Data/Project/STool/Fonts/'\\''+$f\); $fams=[System.Windows.Media.Fonts]::GetFontFamilies\($uri\); foreach\($fam in $fams\){ Write-Output \($f+'\\''  =>  '\\''+$fam.Source\); foreach\($tf in $fam.GetTypefaces\(\)\){ Write-Output \('\\''      weight='\\''+$tf.Weight+'\\'' style='\\''+$tf.Style+'\\'' stretch='\\''+$tf.Stretch\) } } }')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process STool -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(rm -f obj/_shot.ps1 obj/_shot.png obj/_fontcheck.ps1 obj/_packtest.ps1 2>/dev/null; rm -f /c/Users/kabuda/AppData/Local/Temp/MiSans.zip 2>/dev/null; echo cleaned)
